description:
Fetch a URL for agent-readable content.
- The URL must start with http:// or https://
- Format options: "markdown" (default), "html", or "text"
- For markdown output, the tool asks the original URL for markdown/text first, returns markdown or plain text directly, and converts HTML responses to markdown
- Results are truncated at maxChars characters, default 50,000
- When Headroom is enabled and output exceeds the compress threshold, large fetch results are compressed through headroom-ai (requires headroom proxy or HEADROOM_API_KEY)

url.description: The URL to fetch (must start with http:// or https://)

format.description: Return format: markdown (default), html, or text

maxChars.description: Maximum number of characters to return (max 200000, default 50000)
